data.current_description: Check the current WhatsApp Business API connection status.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve WhatsApp Business API connection status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current connection status of the WhatsApp Business API. Returns the connection state (connected/disconnected), last connection timestamp, and any relevant status information. Use this operation to verify API availability before sending messages or to diagnose connectivity issues.

data.current_description: Configure the webhook endpoint URL to receive message delivery notifications and other events.
data.summary_suggestion: Configure webhook endpoint for event notifications
data.description_suggestion: Configures the webhook endpoint URL where the API will send message delivery notifications, status updates, and other events. Requires the webhook URL as input parameter. Replaces any previously configured endpoint. Returns confirmation of the new endpoint configuration. After configuration, all subsequent message events will be delivered to the specified URL via HTTP POST requests.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on inputs required, outputs returned, and side effects. Added details about: input requirements (webhook URL parameter), what happens to previous configuration (replaced), return value (confirmation), and side effects (all future events sent to new URL). This enables AI agents to understand the operation's full impact and prerequisites.

data.current_description: Send a template message to a recipient via WhatsApp Business API.
data.description_suggestion: Send a pre-approved template message to a WhatsApp recipient using the Business Initiated messaging flow. Requires a valid template name and recipient phone number. Supports parameter substitution for dynamic content. Returns a message response containing the message ID and delivery status. Template must be approved before sending.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic and lacks critical details. Added information about template approval requirement, parameter substitution capability, expected inputs (template name, phone number), return value (message ID and status), and the business-initiated context for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Send an interactive message (List or Button type) to a WhatsApp recipient.

data.current_description: Create a new WhatsApp Business API message template with header, body, and footer components.

data.current_description: Retrieve the delivery report for a sent message by its mask ID.
